home.heroSubtitle: Elevate your natural glow with expert dermacosmetics, artistic makeup, and personalized skincare treatments.
home.servicesSubtitle: Tailored beauty and skincare solutions for your specific needs, crafted with artistic precision.
home.packagesSubtitle: Curated bundles for optimal beauty results.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Business management

schedule.title: Hours
schedule.invalidRange: End time must be after start time
schedule.confirmDelete: Delete this schedule? The day will go back to inactive.

admin.dashboardSubtitle: Here's a quick summary of your business. Real data will appear once you start receiving appointments.

emptyStates.noUpcomingDesc: When you book the first appointment it will appear here.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.description: This section will be available in a later project phase.

clients.description: {count, plural, =0 {No clients yet} one {# registered client} other {# registered clients}}
clients.newClientDesc: Create a client manually (walk-in, phone, or to correct data).

empty.noClientsDesc: Clients are created automatically when someone books. You can also create them manually.

form.basicInfoDesc: Contact information. The email is unique and identifies the client.
form.name: Full name

history.title: Appointment history
history.empty: This client has no appointments yet.

clients.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. The client will be permanently deleted.
clients.deleteConfirmDescHasAppts: This client has appointments and cannot be deleted. Cancel the appointments first.

promotions.newCouponDesc: Create a discount coupon with code, validity and limited uses.
promotions.editDescription: Edit the coupon parameters. Code and type are not editable after creation.

form.codeImmutable: Code cannot be changed after creation.
form.serviceIdsHint: Leave empty to apply the coupon to all services.

usages.title: Usage history
usages.empty: This coupon has not been used yet.

empty.noCouponsDesc: Create your first coupon to start offering discounts to your clients.

promotions.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this coupon? Existing usages are preserved.
promotions.confirmDelete: Delete this coupon? This action cannot be undone.

loyalty.description: Configure the active rule for point accumulation and redemption.
loyalty.activeRuleDesc: Current rule: {name}. Saving a new rule will deactivate the previous one.
loyalty.noActiveRule: No active rule. Create the first one to start accumulating points.

form.name: Rule name
form.pointsPerAmountHint: E.g. 1 = 1 point per $1 spent. 0.1 = 1 point per $10.

transactions.empty: This client has no point transactions yet.

adjust.title: Adjust client points
adjust.description: Modify the balance of {name}. Current balance: {balance} pts.
adjust.pointsHint: Use positive numbers to add, negative to subtract.

media.title: Media library
media.description: Upload and organize all the images you will use on your website.

billing.title: Invoices
billing.description: Manual payments and coupon application for invoices of confirmed or completed appointments.

detail.linkedAppointmentDesc: Details of the appointment this invoice is based on.
detail.noCoupons: This invoice has no coupons applied.
detail.appliedCouponsDesc: Coupons redeemed in this invoice and their discounts.

dialogs.markPaidDesc: Confirm the payment method and date.
dialogs.cancelDesc: Indicate the reason for cancellation. This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.applyCouponDesc: Enter the coupon code you want to apply to this invoice.

coupon.exhausted: Coupon has reached its maximum uses
coupon.alreadyApplied: This coupon is already applied to this invoice
coupon.notApplicableToService: Coupon does not apply to this service
coupon.minPurchaseNotReached: Subtotal does not meet the coupon's minimum purchase

empty.noInvoicesDesc: Create an invoice from a confirmed or completed appointment to start recording payments.
empty.notFacturable: This appointment is not billable in its current state
empty.notFacturableDesc: Only confirmed or completed appointments can be invoiced.

errors.notPending: Only pending invoices can be modified
errors.couponUsageNotFound: Coupon usage does not belong to this invoice

settings.description: Upload and organize all the images used across your website.

settings.title: Site settings
settings.description: Configure your site name, contact info, social links and behaviors.

general.title: General information
general.description: Basic site data and booking policies.

contact.title: Contact details
contact.description: Information visible to clients to reach you.

social.title: Social media
social.description: Full URLs of your profiles (leave empty if you don't use one).

features.title: Site features
features.description: Enable or disable entire sections based on your business.
features.blogDesc: When active, posts are visible at /blog
features.offersDesc: When active, /offers section shows current promotions
features.loyaltyDesc: When active, clients accumulate points on purchases

maintenance.title: Maintenance mode
maintenance.description: Temporarily block access to the public site.
maintenance.modeDesc: Public site will show a message instead of normal content

profile.title: Professional profile
profile.description: Information shown on the 'About me' section.
profile.imageDesc: Image displayed next to your bio.
profile.bioDesc: Your story, experience and philosophy. Shown in the 'About me' section.
profile.signatureDesc: A short line at the end of the bio (optional).

credentials.title: Professional credentials
credentials.editDescription: Modify the data for this certification.
credentials.createDescription: Add a certification or course to your credentials.
credentials.emptyDesc: Add your certifications, courses and training here.

carousel.title: Home carousel
carousel.createDescription: Add a new slide to the homepage carousel.
carousel.emptyDesc: Create your first slide for the homepage carousel.

services.title: Services
services.description: Manage the services you offer: prices, duration, extras.
services.createDescription: Define a new service with its optional extras.
services.editDescription: Modify the data, image and extras of the service.
services.extrasDescription: Additional services or materials the client can add to the main service.
services.emptyDesc: Create your first service to start offering bookings.
services.confirmDelete: Delete this service? Its extras will be lost.

packages.title: Packages
packages.description: Bundle several services with special pricing for your clients.
packages.createDescription: Group several services in a package with its own price.
packages.itemsDescription: Select which services form part of the package.
packages.itemsDescriptionCard: Define which services are included and in what quantity.
packages.emptyDesc: Create packages combining services (e.g. Bridal, Birthday, Monthly).

login.signInPrompt: Sign in to your account to continue
login.genericError: Something went wrong, please try again
login.securityNote: Your session is stored securely with encryption.

booking.title: Book appointment
booking.subtitle: Pick your service, date and details to confirm your appointment.
booking.noServices: There are no services available for booking right now.
booking.step1Subtitle: Choose the service you want to book.
booking.noSlotsForDay: No slots available on that day.
booking.step4Hint: Review the details. Once confirmed, your appointment will be pending until admin approval.

fields.name: Full name
fields.notesHint: Tell us about any preferences or allergies. Up to 500 characters.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.loadFailed: Could not load slots. Try again.
errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters

success.title: Booking received!
success.message: Your appointment is pending. We will email you when it's confirmed.

about.title: The Artist Behind the Glow
about.emptyBio: We'll share more about me soon.
